headline: ₹0-50 Cr at risk (contingent on future disclosure lapses, not this event) — Adani Power flagged in 'stocks to watch' amid ESG disclosure focus, minor regulatory risk emerges
what_matters: No evidence of P/E compression or revenue at risk from this mention.
BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, ESRS frameworks noted; no regulatory deadlines or penalties triggered.
Possible marginal increase in cost of capital (+20-40bps) if disclosure gaps persist, but not triggered by this event.
